(f) The planets conjoined with the strong significators and also planets
receiving aspect from the significators.
In the above horoscope. houses 2 and 6 are unoccupied and Moon
is in the 10tn house. The meridian falls at the 6t" degree in Gemini,
according to Nirayana System.
Applying Krishnamurti Padhat~ the meridian in Gemini 6 degrees
means that tht sign is ruled by Mt(cury, the star by Mars and sub by
Sun. Therefore his main profession will be indicated by Mercury, Mal'S
and Sun. Sun and Mei'Cury gi~ him the intelligence, quick understanding,
grasp and because both of them werE~ in a watef'y sign, correct intuition
6 indicated. One of the main occupations indicated by Sun is medicine.
Mars is for surgery and Mercury for quick action and also correct diagnosis.
Hence from the position of the Meridian. one can say that he is a
surgeon.
The others alternative would be that Mars and Mercury indicate
mechan~l engineering, and Sun for service in the Government.
